description_long: This object is a wall-mounted public telephone unit, commonly found in urban environments. The front features a black metal casing adorned with various colorful stickers and a blue and white information panel at the top. A black telephone handset is attached to the unit by a coiled cord, hanging centrally on the front face. The sides of the unit are mostly plain black but also display scattered stickers, adding to its urban, well-used appearance. The back is completely solid and unadorned, indicating it is designed to be mounted against a wall or other flat surface. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for outdoor or semi-outdoor installation.
description: A black, wall-mounted public telephone unit with a handset, stickers, and an information panel, designed for urban use. The front is detailed, while the sides and back are plain and solid.
description_view_0: Front view showing the handset, coiled cord, information panel, and multiple stickers.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the handset profile and scattered stickers on a mostly plain black surface.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely solid, unadorned black surface.
description_view_3: Right side view with more stickers and the handset visible in profile.
attribute_signage_or_labeling: blue and white information panel at the top front
